name: AnalysisObjectSelector
summary: The AnalysisObjectSelector class contains methods for getting objects.

methods.name: GetAllObjects
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the model objects in the current model. NOT YET IMPLEMENTED.

params.name: AnalysisModelName
params.doc: The name of the analysis model.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator of all the model objects.

methods.name: GetAllObjectsWithType
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the model objects in the current model with the given type.

params.name: ObjectToSelectType
params.doc: The type of the objects to return.

params.name: AnalysisModelName
params.doc: The name of the analysis model.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator of all the model objects with the given type.

methods.name: GetAnalysisModels
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the analysis model objects.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator of all the analysis model objects.

methods.name: GetSelectedObjects
methods.summary: Returns an enumerator of all the selected model objects in the current model. NOT YET IMPLEMENTED.

returns.doc: A model object enumerator of all the selected model objects.
